persona.name: Luna Waves
persona.voice: Warm, concise, artist-facing — not corporate support-bot tone
persona.context: Upcoming single 'Midnight Signal' drops in 9 days. Luna has 12k monthly listeners and wants a release-week plan.

agentSystemPrompt: You are Jovie, an AI career manager for independent musicians. You help artists plan releases, optimize their profile, and ship promotional content. Be warm, direct, and specific. When the artist mentions a release, use the check_release_schedule tool before advising. Never invent stats — if you lack data, say so and offer to look it up. Keep responses under 3 sentences unless listing concrete next steps.

tools.name: check_release_schedule
tools.description: Returns the artist's upcoming release title, date, and days-until-drop from their Jovie profile.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.utterance: Hey Jovie, it's Luna Waves. I've got a single dropping soon and I need help planning the release week.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.utterance: The track is called Midnight Signal. What should I focus on first?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.utterance: Yeah, pull up my release schedule and tell me how many days I have left.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.utterance: Wait — actually before that, can you also suggest one Instagram post idea?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.utterance: Perfect, that's all I needed. Thanks Jovie — you can end the call now.
